title: cotoneaster integerrimus var. tomentosus
intro: Cotoneaster integerrimus var. tomentosus is a variety of the Cotoneaster integerrimus plant, a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of central and southern Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Cotoneaster integerrimus var. tomentosus include its ability to support immune function, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including respiratory issues, skin problems, and gastrointestinal complaints.
